raw_responses.title: Compressed Activations for Memory-Efficient LLM Training (CompAct)
raw_responses.snippet: Reduces peak memory by 25-30% for pretraining and 50% for fine-tuning. Activation decomposition: weights stay uncompressed during retraining, exploits activation tensor redundancy.

raw_responses.title: Simple LLM Compression Recovery Using Dynamic Prompting with Theoretical Analysis
raw_responses.snippet: Post-compression performance recovery via dynamic prompting; recovers functionality without retraining.

raw_responses.snippet: Activation-space dimensionality reduction; preserves structure across compression.
